'''Rendili''' was an ancient, conservative [[planet]] located in [[the galaxy]]'s [[Core Worlds]]. [[Arch-Provost]] was a governing position on the planet.

==Description==
Rendili was an ancient [[planet]]<ref name="Battles that Changed the Galaxy" /> located in the [[Rendili system]] within the [[Core Worlds]], positioned at the coordinates M-11 on the [[Standard Galactic Grid]].<ref name="Appendix" /> The planet was the headquarters<ref name="BMF31">{{BuildFalconCite|31|Guide to the Galaxy}}</ref> of the shipbuilding corporation [[Rendili StarDrive]], as well as the company's predecessor, [[Rendili Hyperworks]].<ref name="DoR">''[[Dawn of Rebellion]]''</ref>

==History==
After the [[First Battle of Geonosis]], during which the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship|''Acclamator''-class assault ships]] were introduced, the [[Arch-Provost]] ordered industrial [[Spy|spies]] and [[starship]] designers to reduce [[Kuat]]'s lead for new contracts handed out by the [[Galactic Republic]]. The planet's extensive system of smaller [[shipyard]]s scattered across the [[Mid Rim Territories|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories]] gave Rendili a temporary ascendancy.<ref name="Complete Vehicles 2018" /> During the [[Imperial Era]], Rendili supported the [[Galactic Emperor]] [[Darth Sidious|Sheev Palpatine]].<ref name="Battles that Changed the Galaxy" />

In [[5 ABY]],<ref name="Victory's Price Date">{{VictorysPriceDate}}</ref> the [[New Republic]] [[General]] [[Hera Syndulla]] noted the corvettes that were manufactured on Rendili and [[Corellia]] while the fleet assembled near the planet [[Jakku]]. These ships participated in the [[Battle of Jakku]],<ref name="Victory's Price">''[[Victory's Price: An Alphabet Squadron Novel]]''</ref> which marked the end the [[Galactic Civil War]] with the subsequent signing of the [[Galactic Concordance]].<ref name="TFA Visual Dictionary">''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> After the signing of the Galactic Concordance, which conditionally allowed the remnants of the Empire to peacefully co-exist with the New Republic, Rendili came under control of the [[Inner systems' Imperial remnant]].<ref name="Battles that Changed the Galaxy" />

==Inhabitants==
Arch-Provost was a governing position on the planet.<ref name="Complete Vehicles 2018">[[Star Wars: Complete Vehicles (2018)|''Star Wars: Complete Vehicles'' (2018)]]</ref>
